info.title: RAG Chatbot API
info.description:
Workspace-scoped REST API for a RAG chatbot platform. Multi-tenant via workspace_id isolation. Auth uses httpOnly cookies (access_token, refresh_token). RBAC enforced via 31 permissions across 8 resources.

Email verification is required before signin. Account lockout applies after 5 consecutive failed signin attempts (15 minutes).

**Auth convention**: Protected routes read `access_token` cookie. Workspace-scoped routes also require valid workspace membership; the permission required is noted in each endpoint description.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Signup, email verification, signin, token refresh, logout, password reset

tags.name: Members
tags.description: Invite, list, role change, remove; invitation accept

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Custom role CRUD with permission assignment

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: Read-only reference list of all 31 permissions

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File upload, URL scrape, processing status, download

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Agent CRUD with system prompt and model configuration

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Send message with ReAct loop; JSON and SSE streaming modes

post.description: Register a new user. Sends a verification email — account cannot sign in until email is verified. Rate limited (10 req/15 min).
Verifies the user's email using the token sent by email.
Resends the email verification link. Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email exists — enumeration-safe.

200.description: Verification email sent (always 200 for enumeration safety)

post.description: Authenticates user with email and password. Sets httpOnly access_token and refresh_token cookies on success. Account is locked for 15 minutes after 5 consecutive failed attempts. Rate limited.

200.description: Signed in — access_token and refresh_token cookies set

Set-Cookie.description: Sets access_token (15m) and refresh_token (7d) httpOnly cookies

post.description: Sends a password reset email. Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email exists — enumeration-safe.

200.description: Reset email sent (always 200 for enumeration safety)

example.message: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent

post.description: Resets the user's password using the token from the reset email.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile.

post.description: Rotates the token pair — revokes the old refresh token and issues a new access_token and refresh_token. Requires the refresh_token cookie.

200.description: Tokens rotated — new access_token and refresh_token cookies set

Set-Cookie.description: Sets new access_token (15m) and refresh_token (7d) httpOnly cookies. Old refresh token is revoked.

post.description: Revokes the refresh token and clears auth cookies. Idempotent — succeeds even if the token is already revoked.

put.description: Update the authenticated user's full_name and timezone. Both fields are required.

delete.description: Soft-delete the authenticated user's account, revoke all refresh tokens, and clear auth cookies.

409.description: Sole owner of one or more workspaces — transfer ownership first

example.message: You are the sole owner of one or more workspaces. Transfer ownership before deleting your account.

put.description: Change the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password for verification; revokes all refresh tokens so other sessions are signed out.

get.description: Returns all 31 available permissions that can be assigned to roles. Read-only reference endpoint.
Returns all workspaces the authenticated user belongs to, with their role in each.

post.description: Creates a new workspace. The authenticated user becomes the owner with all 31 permissions. A system agent is automatically created.

get.description: **Permission required**: `workspace:read`
**Permission required**: `member:read`. Includes active members and pending invitations.

post.description: **Permission required**: `member:invite`. Sends an invitation email. If the email has no account, creates a pending invitation — `user_id` will be null until they accept.

get.description: **Permission required**: `member:read`
**Permission required**: `role:read`. Returns system and custom roles.

post.description: **Permission required**: `role:create`

get.description: **Permission required**: `role:read`

put.description: **Permission required**: `role:update`. System roles (is_system: true) cannot be modified.

delete.description: **Permission required**: `role:delete`. System roles cannot be deleted.

get.description: Returns invitation details without authentication — used to show workspace name and role before accepting.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Invitation token from the email link

post.description: Accepts a workspace invitation for the authenticated user.

token.description: Compound invitation token from the email link, in the form `memberId:rawToken`

get.description: **Permission required**: `dataset:read`. Paginated.

post.description: **Permission required**: `dataset:create`

get.description: **Permission required**: `dataset:read`

delete.description: **Permission required**: `dataset:delete`. Soft-deletes the dataset and all its files.

post.description: **Permission required**: `conversation:create`. Creates a new conversation pre-linked to this dataset. Shortcut for POST /conversations with dataset_ids pre-filled.
**Permission required**: `file:upload`. Uploads a file to LlamaIndex for parsing. Processing is async — poll file status to track progress.

file.description: File to upload (PDF, DOCX, TXT, etc.)

post.description: **Permission required**: `file:upload`. Fetches URL content via Firecrawl and adds it as a dataset file. Processing is async.

get.description: **Permission required**: `file:read`. Paginated. Does NOT include signed_url — use GET /files/{file_id} to get download URL.
**Permission required**: `file:read`. Includes a pre-signed download URL (`signed_url`). Not available on the list endpoint.

200.description: File retrieved with signed download URL

post.description: **Permission required**: `file:reprocess`. Re-queues the file for the embedding pipeline. Only files with status `completed` or `failed` can be reprocessed — returns 400 for any other status.

get.description: **Permission required**: `file:read`. Returns the exploration questions generated for the file during processing.
**Permission required**: `file:read`. Returns a random sample of exploration questions drawn from the dataset's completed files, used to seed chat suggested prompts.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of questions to return.

get.description: **Permission required**: `file:read`. Returns paginated document chunks for the file.
**Permission required**: `agent:read`. Paginated. Includes the system agent.

post.description: **Permission required**: `agent:create`. When `is_default` is `true`, also requires `agent:update`.

409.description: Conflict — the default agent was changed concurrently. Retry the request.

example.message: The default agent was changed by someone else. Please try again.

get.description: **Permission required**: `agent:read`

put.description: **Permission required**: `agent:update`. The system agent's name cannot be changed — returns 403.

409.description: Conflict — the default agent was changed concurrently. Retry the request.

example.message: The default agent was changed by someone else. Please try again.

delete.description: **Permission required**: `agent:delete`. The system agent cannot be deleted — returns 403. Agents in use by conversations cannot be deleted (FK RESTRICT).

get.description: **Permission required**: `conversation:read`. Returns only the authenticated user's own conversations — other workspace members' conversations are not visible even with this permission. This is intentional privacy-by-design.

post.description: **Permission required**: `conversation:create`

get.description: **Permission required**: `conversation:read`. Returns full message and citation history. Returns 404 if the conversation belongs to another user — this is intentional, not a bug.

200.description: Conversation retrieved with messages and citations

put.description: **Permission required**: `conversation:update`. Only the conversation owner can update it.

delete.description: **Permission required**: `conversation:delete`. Only the conversation owner can delete it.

post.description:
**Permission required**: `conversation:chat`.

Runs a ReAct loop with RAG search over linked datasets. Response mode is controlled by the `Accept` header:

- `Accept: application/json` — synchronous response, returns full event sequence after loop completes
- `Accept: text/event-stream` — streaming SSE response, events arrive in real time

See `SseStream` schema for event types and payloads. Auto-titles the conversation on the first message.

200.description: Message processed. Response format depends on Accept header.

get.description: **Permission required**: `audit:read`. Append-only log of all workspace actions. Paginated.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filter by the UUID of the user who performed the action

get.description: Returns service health status. Mounted before rate limiting so load balancers are not throttled. Returns 200 when healthy, 503 when DB unreachable.

AccessToken.name: access_token
AccessToken.description: JWT access token (httpOnly cookie set by server, expires in 15m)

RefreshToken.name: refresh_token
RefreshToken.description: JWT refresh token (httpOnly cookie set by server, expires in 7d). Used for token rotation — revokes old token and issues new pair.

X-Request-Id.description: Correlation ID for request tracing. Accepts a valid UUID or generates one.

MemberIdParam.name: member_id
MemberIdParam.description: UUID of the workspace member record

example.message: You do not have permission to perform this action
Too many requests, please try again later

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character

UserBasic.description: Returned by signup, signin, and refresh

settings.description: Arbitrary workspace configuration (JSONB — empty object by default)

allOf.description: Workspace with the authenticated user's role — returned by list endpoint only
Returned by GET /workspaces/{workspace_id} — includes the authenticated user's resolved permission names for this workspace

UpdateWorkspaceRequest.description: All fields optional — at least one must be provided

user_id.description: null when status is invited and user has not yet created an account

InvitationPreview.description: Returned by GET /api/invitations/{token} — no authentication required

is_system.description: true for owner/admin/editor/viewer — cannot be modified or deleted

permission_ids.description: UUIDs of permissions to assign to the role. Minimum 1 required.

UpdateRoleRequest.description: All fields optional — at least one must be provided. System roles cannot be renamed or have their permissions changed.

file_count.description: Number of files in this dataset.

total_size_mb.description: Total size of all files in megabytes.

UpdateProfileRequest.description: Both fields required. Unknown fields are stripped.

timezone.description: A valid IANA time zone name (e.g. "Asia/Bangkok"), validated against Intl.supportedValuesOf("timeZone").

UpdateDatasetRequest.description: All fields optional — at least one must be provided. chunk_size, chunk_overlap, and embedding_model are immutable after creation and will be ignored if sent.

allOf.description: Only returned by GET /files/{file_id} — not included in list responses

signed_url.description: Pre-signed R2 download URL (1-hour expiry). null when file has no storage_path — e.g. URL-scraped files before processing completes.

UpdateFileRequest.description: All fields optional — at least one must be provided

model.description: On update, the agent's currently saved model is also accepted (grandfathered) even if absent from this list.

is_system.description: One system agent per workspace — cannot be deleted or renamed

is_default.description: When true, this agent becomes the workspace default (the previous default is cleared atomically). Only true is accepted. Requires the agent:update permission in addition to agent:create.

UpdateAgentRequest.description: All fields optional — at least one must be provided. The system agent's name cannot be changed (returns 403 if attempted).

is_default.description: When true, this agent becomes the workspace default (the previous default is cleared atomically). Only true is accepted.

step_type.description: Only input and final_answer are returned in conversation detail; thought and observation are internal ReAct steps

citation_number.description: Used as [1], [2], ... inline in message content

Conversation.description: Conversations are scoped to the creating user. GET /conversations returns only the authenticated user's conversations. GET /conversations/:id returns 404 for other users' conversations even if they have conversation:read permission — this is intentional privacy-by-design.

title.description: Auto-set from first message excerpt if not provided

dataset_ids.description: Linked datasets used for RAG context

allOf.description: Returned by GET /conversations/:id — includes full message and citation history

agent_id.description: Defaults to workspace system agent if omitted

ChatEvent.description: A single event in the JSON-mode chat response. Payloads by event type: token → {text:string}, thought → {text:string}, observation → {text:string}, citation → {chunk_id,citation_number,cited_text,filename,relevance_score}, done → {message_id,prompt_tokens,completion_tokens,latency_ms}

ChatResponse.description: Returned when Accept: application/json. Contains the full event sequence after the ReAct loop completes.

SseStream.description:
Returned when Accept: text/event-stream. The connection streams standard SSE frames until the done event closes it.

Event types and payloads:
- token: {"text":"..."} — append to UI response
- thought: {"text":"..."} — internal ReAct reasoning (show in collapsible)
- observation: {"text":"..."} — RAG search result summary
- citation: {"chunk_id":"uuid","citation_number":1,"cited_text":"...","filename":"doc.pdf","relevance_score":0.91}
- done: {"message_id":"uuid","prompt_tokens":312,"completion_tokens":88,"latency_ms":1420}
